title: ranunculus firmulus
intro: Ranunculus firmulus, also known as lesser celandine, is a perennial plant with yellow flowers and yellow-green leaves. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which are attributed to the presence of compounds like protoanemonin and ranunculin. The health benefits of Ranunculus firmulus include its ability to treat skin conditions, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Ranunculus firmulus is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its preparation and use should be done under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
